prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace the alertmanager notification pipeline from a firing alert to the receiver dispatch in prometheus/alertmanager. Find Go source files implementing: alert ingestion, the routing tree traversal, the inhibition check, the silence check, and the final notifier dispatch.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the prometheus-monitoring fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Trace the alertmanager notification pipeline from a firing alert to the receiver dispatch in prometheus/alertmanager. Find Go source files implementing: alert ingestion, the routing tree traversal, the inhibition check, the silence check, and the final notifier dispatch.
